column1: # NACA Report 832 (Graham
# high-speed tunnel
# The five sections of Report 832 are NACA 65_2-215 (a=0.5)
# 0006..0018 thickness family.
# Produced by reference/digitize_tr832_fig40_42.py -- see that file for
# the method
# Only the NACA 0015 and the NACA 4415 are given.  The 0015 is the only
# symmetric section of the five and so the only curve that can sit at
# zero; the 4415 is alone in the whole lower half of the plot near -4
# deg.  Both identities are fixed by physics
# pattern off the scan.  The other three (65_2-215
# inside a 0.5 deg band around -1.3 deg; their order is not recoverable
# from this scan and they are deliberately omitted.
# Self-check: 0015 level below M=0.6 is +0.193 deg
#             (symmetry demands 0.000 -- this validates the y calibration)
#             4415 level below M=0.6 is -4.046 deg
#             (published low-speed value -4.0)
# columns = readable image columns averaged into the Mach bin.
mach
